sources.expression:
get_option(
			self::get_nps_id( $plugin_slug ),
			array(
				'dismiss_count'       => 0,
				'dismiss_permanently' => false,
				'dismiss_step'        => '',
				'dismiss_time'        => '',
				'dismiss_timespan'    => null,
				'first_render_time'   => null,
			)
		)

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( date_i18n( 'F j, Y', strtotime( '-7 days' ) ) )
esc_html( date_i18n( 'F j, Y', strtotime( '-1 day' ) ) )
esc_html( date_i18n( 'F j, Y', strtotime( '-7 days' ) ) )
esc_html( date_i18n( 'F j, Y', strtotime( '-1 day' ) ) )
esc_html( sprintf( __( 'Help improve %s by sharing non-sensitive usage data — like PHP version and features used.' ), $args['title'] ) )
wp_kses_post( sprintf( '%2s', esc_url( $args['usage_doc_link'] ), __( 'Learn More.' ) ) )
